NAME: ID
DEFINITION: Anonymized patient identifier (deterministic hash of CPF; one row per patient in master table, multiple rows per patient in long-format tables)

NAME: IDX_DT
DEFINITION: Index date (event/exam used as time-zero for analyses). Define operationally for the cohort.

NAME: ENTRY_DT
DEFINITION: First eligible date the patient appears in the source database

NAME: LAST_SEEN
DEFINITION: Last appearance of patient in source database (proxy for administrative censor)

NAME: DEATH_DT
DEFINITION: Date of death (from mortality registry linkage when available)

NAME: FU_STATUS
DEFINITION: Follow-up status: E (event), C (administrative censor), L (loss >12m)

NAME: AGE
DEFINITION: Age at index date
AVAILABLE: Use complete years; never expose date of birth.

NAME: SEX
DEFINITION: Biological sex: M (male), F (female), U (unknown)

NAME: RACE
DEFINITION: Race/ethnicity per local classification (e.g., IBGE Brazilian: BRANCA, PRETA, PARDA, AMARELA, INDIGENA, SI)
AVAILABLE: SI = sem informação. May be missing in private-network data.

NAME: BMI
DEFINITION: Body mass index (calculated)

NAME: WT
DEFINITION: Body weight

NAME: HT
DEFINITION: Height

NAME: REGION
DEFINITION: Geographic region of care

NAME: STATE
DEFINITION: State / federative unit of care

NAME: COMORB
DEFINITION: Charlson Comorbidity Index score

NAME: COMORB_F
DEFINITION: JSON object with comorbidity flags (e.g., dm, htn, obesity, cvd, ckd, malig)

NAME: EXPOSURE_F
DEFINITION: Primary exposure flag (define operationally for the cohort)

NAME: EXPOSURE_DT
DEFINITION: Date of first exposure (when applicable)

NAME: TX_REGIMEN
DEFINITION: Treatment regimen (study-specific): use abbreviation codes (e.g., TDF, ETV, COMB, NONE)

NAME: TX_START
DEFINITION: Date of first treatment dispensation

NAME: TX_END
DEFINITION: Date of last treatment dispensation

NAME: TX_DUR
DEFINITION: Treatment duration

NAME: TX_ADHER
DEFINITION: Treatment adherence as Medication Possession Ratio (days covered / period days)

NAME: HOSP_N
DEFINITION: Number of hospitalizations during follow-up

NAME: HOSP_DAYS
DEFINITION: Total days hospitalized during follow-up

NAME: ICU_N
DEFINITION: Number of ICU admissions during follow-up

NAME: ICU_DAYS
DEFINITION: Total days in ICU during follow-up

NAME: ED_N
DEFINITION: Number of emergency visits during follow-up

NAME: EXAM_N
DEFINITION: Number of disease-relevant exams per year of follow-up

NAME: OUTCOME_F
DEFINITION: Primary outcome event flag (define operationally for the cohort)

NAME: OUTCOME_DT
DEFINITION: Date of earliest evidence of primary outcome

NAME: COHORT
DEFINITION: Cohort assignment after filters (e.g., CHB, INIT, EXCL_AC; replace with study-specific labels)
